km_to_grid: Distance from community centroid to nearest electricity grid point (km)
hh_pov: Fraction of households below ZAR 6,000/year in 1996
pr_female_hh_head: Fraction of households headed by a female
sex_ratio: Ratio of African adult women to men in 1996
pr_indian_or_white: Fraction of households headed by Indian or white person
pr_hs_men: Fraction of African men with matric (high school)
pr_hs_women: Fraction of African women with matric (high school)
d_water_access: Change in fraction of HHs with water source nearby
d_toilet: Change in fraction of HHs with flush toilet
